failed_tags.claim: Voss record: 50W-52L-1D across 103 games, 48.5% win rate, aggregate margin +291 points
failed_tags.reason: Data shows 49W-45L-1D across 95 games (2022-2025). If 2022-2025 Voss tenure is correct (36.4% 2021 → 54.5% 2022 jump), the counts do not match the claimed totals. Aggregate margin is +469, not +291. Document states 50W-52L but data yields 49W-45L.

diagnostic_notes.voss_tenure_analysis: The document references Voss's 'first season' as producing an 18-point jump from 36.4% to 54.5%. Data confirms 2021 (8-22, 36.4%) under prior coach → 2022 (12-10, 54.5%) under Voss. If Voss tenure spans 2022-2025 as methodology implies, cumulative record is 49W-45L-1D (95 games, 51.6% win rate, +469 margin). The claimed 50W-52L-1D (48.5% rate, +291 margin) does not match this span. Possible explanations: (a) tenure includes partial pre-2022 or post-2025 games; (b) terminology error in document. No match found in available data.
diagnostic_notes.rank_inconsistencies: Three rank claims fail. Possible causes: (a) document and CSV use different ranking methods (e.g., ties broken differently); (b) CSV data is newer than document's source (predicted R11 CSV is 2026-05-11_1942, document published 2026-05-15); (c) document author hand-checked a different model run. File is correct per CSV; ranks are off by 4, 7, and 7 positions respectively.
diagnostic_notes.2023_2024_records: Verified as 15-10-1 (26 games) and 13-11 (24 games) respectively. These match document claim of 'finals in 2023 (preliminary final) and 2024' and game counts.
diagnostic_notes.mcgovern_goals_note: Document notes McGovern 19 goals from 9 games. Also states '2.11 average when counted on 9 listed appearances; 2.38 if averaged only across games where he kicked.' Data confirms 19 total goals / 9 games = 2.11; 19 / 8 games-with-goals ≈ 2.38. Both formulations in document are accurate.
diagnostic_notes.mckay_goals: Harry McKay: 11 goals from 8 games in 2026 (verified). Document claim is '1.38 per game' which is 11/8 = 1.375 ≈ 1.38 when rounded.
